description: Buffer schema for engine-native temporal buffer captures exported from real-time renderers (Unreal Engine, Unity, custom renderers).

required_buffers.name: current_color
required_buffers.description: Current frame pre-tonemapped linear RGB color. Captured after TAA input, before TAA resolve.
required_buffers.channel_convention: R, G, B in linear light (not gamma-corrected)

engine_specific.unreal: SceneColor after deferred shading, before r.TemporalAA
engine_specific.unity: ColorTexture at BeforeTransparent injection point, before TemporalAA pass
engine_specific.custom: Linear HDR color buffer at TAA input stage

required_buffers.name: history_color
required_buffers.description: Previous resolved frame color, reprojected to current frame coordinates using motion vectors. This is the temporal history input to TAA.
required_buffers.channel_convention: R, G, B reprojected to current frame coordinates

engine_specific.unreal: HistoryColor buffer from TemporalAA pass inputs
engine_specific.unity: TAA history buffer sampled at reprojected UV
engine_specific.custom: Reprojected previous frame using supplied motion vectors

required_buffers.name: motion_vectors
required_buffers.description: Per-pixel motion vectors in screen-space pixel offset units. Each vector points from current pixel to corresponding pixel in the previous frame.
required_buffers.channel_convention: X = horizontal pixel offset (positive = samples from right in history), Y = vertical pixel offset (positive = samples from below in history)
required_buffers.range: unbounded; typical range ±resolution pixels for full-motion frames
required_buffers.note: Some engines export motion vectors as normalized UV offsets — convert to pixel offsets by multiplying by resolution.

engine_specific.unreal: r.BasePassOutputsVelocity=1, VelocityBuffer pass — already in pixel offset space
engine_specific.custom: Per-pixel (dx, dy) in pixel units pointing to previous frame position

required_buffers.name: current_depth
required_buffers.description: Per-pixel depth for the current frame. Must be monotonically increasing with distance from camera.
required_buffers.note: Reversed-Z NDC depth is NOT directly usable. Convert to linear depth before export.

engine_specific.unreal: SceneDepth (linear depth) from GBuffer — NOT HZB or reversed-Z NDC
engine_specific.unity: CameraDepthTexture converted to linear depth via LinearEyeDepth()
engine_specific.custom: Linear depth in world units or normalized linear depth

required_buffers.name: current_normals
required_buffers.description: Per-pixel view-space normals for the current frame. Used for disocclusion detection.
required_buffers.channel_convention: X, Y, Z unit vector; camera-facing surface has positive Z in view space

engine_specific.unreal: GBufferB.xyz decoded from WorldNormal, transformed to view space
engine_specific.unity: NormalTexture from G-buffer decoded, transformed to view space

optional_buffers.name: history_depth
optional_buffers.description: Depth buffer from the previous frame, reprojected to current frame coordinates. If absent, a proxy is derived from the current depth using motion vector extrapolation. Labeled derived-low-confidence when absent.

optional_buffers.name: history_normals
optional_buffers.description: Normal buffer from the previous frame, reprojected to current frame coordinates. If absent, history normals are approximated from the current normals. Labeled derived-low-confidence when absent.

optional_buffers.name: roi_mask
optional_buffers.description: Per-pixel ROI mask (1.0 = in ROI, 0.0 = not in ROI). If absent, a derived mask is computed from depth+normal discontinuities. Native mask is preferred for Demo A evaluation.

optional_buffers.name: jitter
optional_buffers.description: Per-frame sub-pixel jitter offset used for TAA. Format: [jitter_x, jitter_y] in pixel units.

optional_buffers.name: camera_matrices
optional_buffers.description: Camera view + projection matrices for the current and previous frames. Used for improved reprojection quality validation.

optional_buffers.name: history_validity_mask
optional_buffers.description: Per-pixel mask indicating valid history pixels (1.0 = valid history, 0.0 = invalid/disocclusion). If absent, history validity is inferred from motion vector + depth consistency.

required_fields.name: real_external_data
required_fields.description: true for real captures, false for placeholders

optional_fields.name: jitter_x
optional_fields.description: Sub-pixel jitter X in pixel units

optional_fields.name: jitter_y
optional_fields.description: Sub-pixel jitter Y in pixel units

optional_fields.name: exposure
optional_fields.description: Exposure value used for this frame

notes: All required buffers must match in width and height. Shape mismatch is a hard rejection.
Color buffers must be in linear light. Gamma-encoded buffers will produce incorrect trust scores.
Motion vectors must be in pixel offset units. UV offset convention must be converted before import.
Depth must be monotonically increasing with distance. Reversed-Z NDC must be converted before export.
Normals must be view-space unit vectors. World-space normals must be transformed before export.
Optional buffers that are absent are labeled derived-low-confidence in all reports.
There is no acceptable substitute for real capture data. Do not use placeholder values for required buffers.
